# dependencytrack_ldap_user (Resource)

Manages an LDAP User.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dependencytrack_ldap_user" "example" {
  username = "Example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) Username of the User.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Username of the User.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import dependencytrack_ldap_user.example Example
```
